item.title:
MarkOHaire: Betfair reposteó Mark O'Haire @MarkOHaire · 42min The @Betfair Podcasts are live:
Saturday: https:// pod.fo/e/3ffa
RacingPost: Racing Post @RacingPost · 40min Thurles will continue to host race meetings until March 2027 after Horse Racing Ireland
item.description: Racing Post @RacingPost · 40min Thurles will continue to host race meetings until March 2027 after Horse Racing Ireland and Thurles Race Company agreed to facilitate the continuation of racing following a successful winter racing season 3 3 10 2 mil

item.title: tony_calvin: Tony Calvin @tony_calvin · 45min SATURDAY's detailed copy on all nine ITV races. For @AKBets . Well over 3,000 words a
item.description: Tony Calvin @tony_calvin · 45min SATURDAY's detailed copy on all nine ITV races. For @AKBets . Well over 3,000 words and a complete stats/info section at end - with a betting/analysis update to come on Saturday morning. If a job is worth doing....; De tips.akbets.co.uk 1 1 1 348

item.title:
Betfair: Betfair @Betfair · 1h "I don't see enough fight"
@alanshearer thinks the Tottenham players are resigned to relegation
